title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access the dashboard.

title: Payment Failed During Checkout
description: Customer reports that their payment is failing during checkout despite using a valid credit card.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their invoice from the billing section. The download button does not respond.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer noticed that the billing address on their invoice is incorrect and wants it updated.

title: Account Verification Email Not Received
description: Customer signed up but did not receive the verification email needed to activate their account.

title: App Crashes on Startup
description: Customer reports that the application crashes immediately after opening it on their mobile device.

title: Profile Picture Not Updating
description: Customer tried uploading a new profile picture but the old one keeps showing even after refresh.

title: Search Feature Not Returning Results
description: Customer says that searching for products returns no results even though items exist in the catalog.

title: Notifications Not Appearing
description: Customer does not receive notifications for important updates even though notifications are enabled.

title: Subscription Plan Incorrect
description: Customer upgraded their subscription but the system still shows the old plan.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Not Working
description: Customer cannot complete login because the 2FA code sent to their phone is not being accepted.

title: Dashboard Loading Slowly
description: Customer reports that the dashboard takes over 20 seconds to load after logging in.

title: File Upload Failed
description: Customer attempted to upload a document but received an error saying the upload failed.

title: Incorrect Order Details
description: Customer noticed that their order history shows incorrect product details.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Customer reports that the password reset link expires immediately after clicking it.
